id.description: The unique identifier for the funding instrument.

account_id.description: The Twitter Ads account id this funding instrument belongs to. Carried from the parent /accounts/{id}/funding_instruments call by the connector; the API response payload itself does not include it. Nullable so the schema stays compatible with rows synced before this field was attached.

type.description: Funding instrument type (e.g. CREDIT_CARD, CREDIT_LINE, AGENCY_CREDIT_LINE, INSERTION_ORDER).

description.description: Human-readable description (e.g. last 4 digits of the credit card, agency name).

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code the funding instrument bills in (e.g. USD, EUR).

paused.description: Whether spending against this funding instrument is paused.

cancelled.description: Whether the funding instrument has been cancelled.

able_to_fund.description: Whether the funding instrument is currently able to fund campaigns.

reasons_not_able_to_fund.description: Reasons the funding instrument is not able to fund, when applicable.

credit_limit_local_micro.description: Credit limit in local micro currency. Only set for credit-line type instruments.

credit_remaining_local_micro.description: Credit remaining in local micro currency. Only set for credit-line type instruments.

funded_amount_local_micro.description: Funded amount in local micro currency.

end_time.description: Funding instrument end timestamp; null for open-ended instruments.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the funding instrument was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the funding instrument was last updated.
